evals.prompt: Obsidianのプラグインを作りたいんだけど、毎日のワークアウトの記録がめんどくさくて。今はノートに手動で書いてるんだけど、もっと楽にしたい。サイドバーに専用のビューを出して、そこからサクッと入力できるといいなと思ってる。
evals.expected_output: インタビューを通じてユーザーのワークアウト記録プラグインの要件を引き出し、requirements.mdとして出力する。Core Features（記録入力UI、サイドバービュー）、UI Components（コマンド、カスタムビュー）、Data Access（Vault内のノートへの書き込み）が含まれること。

assertions.name: has_problem_statement
assertions.description: requirements.md contains a '## Problem Statement' section

assertions.name: has_numbered_requirements
assertions.description: requirements.md contains numbered functional requirements like FR-01

assertions.name: has_ui_components
assertions.description: requirements.md contains a UI Components section

assertions.name: has_out_of_scope
assertions.description: requirements.md contains an Out of Scope section

assertions.name: mentions_personal_use
assertions.description: requirements.md explicitly mentions personal use or non-distribution scope

assertions.name: no_implementation_code
assertions.description: requirements.md does not contain code blocks or Obsidian API method calls

assertions.name: mentions_sidebar_view
assertions.description: requirements.md mentions a sidebar view or panel

assertions.name: mentions_vault_write
assertions.description: requirements.md mentions writing data to vault notes

evals.prompt: 最近Obsidianでメモを取るとき、特定のテンプレートを何度も貼り付けてるんだよね。会議メモとか、読書メモとか。毎回TemplaterかQuickAddを使うんだけど、もっとシンプルに自分専用のコマンドでテンプレートを挿入できるプラグインを作りたい。
evals.expected_output: テンプレート挿入プラグインの要件定義。テンプレートの種類・保存場所・挿入トリガー（コマンド/ショートカット）を明確にし、既存プラグイン（Templater/QuickAdd）との差別化ポイントも要件に反映すること。

assertions.name: has_problem_statement
assertions.description: requirements.md contains a '## Problem Statement' section

assertions.name: has_numbered_requirements
assertions.description: requirements.md contains numbered functional requirements like FR-01

assertions.name: has_ui_components
assertions.description: requirements.md contains a UI Components section

assertions.name: has_out_of_scope
assertions.description: requirements.md contains an Out of Scope section

assertions.name: mentions_personal_use
assertions.description: requirements.md explicitly mentions personal use or non-distribution scope

assertions.name: no_implementation_code
assertions.description: requirements.md does not contain TypeScript code blocks

assertions.name: mentions_commands
assertions.description: requirements.md mentions commands or command palette

assertions.name: mentions_template_storage
assertions.description: requirements.md mentions where templates are stored

evals.prompt: Obsidianのプラグインを作りたい。タグ管理が大変で、同じような意味のタグが増えすぎてる。どのタグが何個のノートで使われてるか一覧で見たくて、使われてないタグを削除したり、タグをまとめてリネームしたりしたい。
evals.expected_output: タグ管理プラグインの要件定義。タグ一覧表示・使用頻度・削除・リネームの機能要件を整理し、バルク操作や確認ダイアログの有無などUIの詳細も含むこと。

assertions.name: has_problem_statement
assertions.description: requirements.md contains a '## Problem Statement' section

assertions.name: has_numbered_requirements
assertions.description: requirements.md contains numbered functional requirements like FR-01

assertions.name: has_ui_components
assertions.description: requirements.md contains a UI Components section

assertions.name: has_out_of_scope
assertions.description: requirements.md contains an Out of Scope section

assertions.name: mentions_personal_use
assertions.description: requirements.md explicitly mentions personal use or non-distribution scope

assertions.name: no_implementation_code
assertions.description: requirements.md does not contain TypeScript code blocks

assertions.name: mentions_tag_listing
assertions.description: requirements.md mentions tag listing with usage counts

assertions.name: mentions_rename
assertions.description: requirements.md mentions rename operation for tags

assertions.name: mentions_delete
assertions.description: requirements.md mentions delete operation for tags
